message:
Migrate Block .style() to .border_style() and add nested block comments

API migration:
- Replace all 25 occurrences of Block::new().style() with .border_style()
  across code_explorer.rs (18) and shakespeare.rs (7) to match the renamed
  ratatui Block API for setting border styling

Syntax highlighting:
- Add nested block comment support to GenericTokenizer via new
  scan_nested_block_comment method that tracks nesting depth for
  /* ... /* ... */ ... */ style comments
- Update continue_block_comment to accept LineState for distinguishing
  CommentKind::Block from CommentKind::Nested(depth)
- Enable nested_comments for Haskell tokenizer ({- {- nested -} -})
- Explicitly disable nested_comments for zig, mermaid, typescript, go,
  sql, and yaml tokenizers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
